description: Product description 2 x Aldi Hotel Collection No 3 Pomegranate Perfume | Aldi 100ml Spray Eau De Parfum for Women. This listing is for TWO bottles of Hotel Collection No 3 Pomegranate Perfume by Aldi each of which is 100ml Eau De Parfum Spray for Women. Smell amazing with this No 3 Pomegranate fragrance; a sublime scent that will captivate and enchant your senses. Treat yourself, your wife, girlfriend, mother, sister, daughter, friend, teacher, valentine or any loved one to this exquisite gift to show them how much you care. Beautifully presented and gift boxed. Cruelty Free - Not tested on animals. Ingredients Pomegranate Directions Spray 2-3 times on wrists, neck and behind ears. See more
